title: taraxacum dilaniatum
intro: Taraxacum dilaniatum, also known as the dilated dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and yellow flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum dilaniatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Taraxacum dilaniatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms for therapeutic purposes.
